subcodes.first_line: In the Persian tongue is this revealed, that the souls of that land may hearken and discover the Truth, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلسان پارسی ذکر میشود تا نفوس آن ارض بشنوند و بیابند حق جل جلاله بلسان
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
